$comment: Optional capability modules. Each is a prompt fragment a consumer (e.g. tela's MCP deck flow, or a CLI agent) appends to AGENTS.md ONLY when that capability is present in the run — so the always-served core contract stays lean. Append the file's contents after AGENTS.md when `when` holds.

modules.when: the deck has brand inputs to honor — a logo, brand color(s), or a brand name/personality
modules.adds: how to turn a brand brief into a deck: pick the variant that fits the brand, set the accent to the brand hue (hue-matched, not exact), wire the logo, set lang
